fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period shown in the line.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the start date of the period defined on the line for the resource group.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total capacity for the corresponding time period.

fields.name: Qty. on Order (Job)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of measuring units allocated to projects with the status order.

fields.name: Availability After Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity minus the quantity on order.

fields.name: Qty. Quoted (Job)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of measuring units allocated to projects with the status quote.

fields.name: Net Availability
fields.tooltip: Specifies capacity, minus the quantity on order (Project), minus quantity on Service Order, minus Project Quotes Allocation.
